      • getVasMode

      • setVasMode

        public void setVasMode(java.lang.String vasMode)
        VAS Mode

        0 - VAS_ONLY
        1 – VAS_AND_PAYMENT
        2 – VAS_OR_PAYMENT
        3 – PAYMENT_ONLY

        Parameters:
        vasMode - VAS Mode
